name: ASUS TUF GAMING X570-PLUS (WI-FI) ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD X570 Chipset - Supports DDR4 Memory - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x1 - CrossFireX Ready - 2x M.2 Socket3 - HDMI - DP - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi & BT 5.0
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING X570-PLUS ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD X570
description: ATX gaming motherboard with PCIe 4.0 support and WiFi for AM4 Ryzen processors.
